title: Petition to rename road Trump Tower is on after Obama at 22k signatures
shortDescription: A tower in Chicago's town spells 'TRUMP' in big letters. A petition wants to change the road it's on to "Obama Ave." Is it possible?

title: Trump's pick bests Kemp's pick in GA. OK rejects wage hike: takeaways
shortDescription: Voters across four states and Washington, D.C. flocked to the polls as the president's outsized role weighed heavily in various contests.

title: Who won the GA Republican Senate runoff? Trump-back candidate on top
shortDescription: Rep. Mike Collins defeated former college football coach Derek Dooley in the Republican Senate runoff in Georgia. Now eyes turn to November.

title: DOJ reveals alleged White House plot images
shortDescription: DOJ shares images of suspects accused in alleged UFC White House drone explosives plot tied to anti-government conspiracy theories.

title: Congress, out of the loop in Trump's Iran talks, wants vote on deal
shortDescription: "If it's a secret deal, then how can I take it seriously?" Sen. Thom Tillis, R-North Carolina, said.

title: 'Not a personal sandbox.' Trump's Garden of American Heroes faces suit
shortDescription: The lawsuit is the latest among a spate of litigation opposing several construction projects undertaken by the president.

title: Trump wants grass greener on his side of fence after UFC event
shortDescription: The White House is getting new sod and seeding to restore the South Lawn after the UFC Freedom 250 event.

title: Split decision for Trump-backed candidates in Georgia
shortDescription: Rep. Mike Collins won the GOP nomination for Senate in Georgia, but Rick Jackson defeated Lt. Gov. Burt Jones in the Republican gubernatorial race.

title: Trump news today, June 16. It's primary Election Day in these states
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is still in France for the G7 Summit. At home, it's primary Election Day in these states. Plus, the latest on Iran.

title: Trump's ballroom price tag soars to $600 million, according to report
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's ballroom is projected to cost $600 million, significantly more than the he's said, according to a Washington Post report.

title: Trump admin change may disrupt services for students with disabilities
shortDescription: The Education Department said the decision to outsource work to other agencies 'will not impact students, parents or families.'

title: Michelle Obama hate persists post-White House
shortDescription: During UFC Freedom 250, fighter Josh Hokit yelled, “Michelle Obama is a man!” It's the latest in endless hateful remarks toward the former first lady.

title: Are Trump, Don Jr. on different sides of the Georgia governor primary?
shortDescription: Donald Trump Jr. posted his support of Rick Jackson, despite his father endorsing the other candidate in the Georgia Republican governor runoff.

title: Trump talks US-Iran deal, Israel at G7
shortDescription: President Donald Trump defends US-Iran deal with warnings on nuclear weapons while addressing Israel and Lebanon tensions at the G7 summit.

title: Newsom claims DOJ probe tied to Trump
shortDescription: Gov. Gavin Newsom says the DOJ is investigating him and his wife, calling it political retaliation as sources say some staff are included as well.

shortDescription: Here's what to know about primary elections across Georgia, California and more.

title: Trump says Iran won't have nuclear weapon ahead of peace deal
shortDescription: The president declared Iran has agreed to abandon its nuclear program. Tehran has not made a clear response.

title: Pastor running for Congress says he 'crossed boundary' with texts
shortDescription: Married Tulsa pastor and congressional candidate Jackson Lahmeyer admits to crossing boundary line with text messages to Miss Oklahoma USA 2007.

title: Black gay men could make history in Congress as political power erodes
shortDescription: As Republicans carve up Black voting districts, a record number of Black gay men could serve in Congress. What should representation look like?

title: DC poised to elect a democratic socialist mayor, and Trump isn't happy
shortDescription: Federal overreach is "absolutely a major factor" activists say in the race to lead Washington, DC, featuring a democratic socialist front-runner.
